description.ko: 터쿼이즈빛 해파리가 심해의 압도적인 압력을 밝히는, 미드나잇 존 속 투명한 생명체들의 평화로운 춤입니다.
description.en: The peaceful dance of transparent life in the midnight zone, where turquoise jellyfish illuminate the crushing pressure of the deep sea.

prompt: A cinematic ultra-detailed shot of AQUA-5, titled 'The Bioluminescent Current.' A swarm of #40E0D0 turquoise jellyfish with #48D1CC cyan tendrils drift through the #000080 midnight zone of the deep ocean. The #006994 water is thick with marine snow and glowing micro-bubbles. High-tech underwater floodlights illuminate ancient mineral vents on the seabed. 8k resolution, photorealistic fluid dynamics, capturing the peaceful dance of transparent life in the high-pressure deep.
